message:
chore(audit): record batches 414-415 (monitors, chaos, messaging, trace)

Batch 414: eprocess.rs (1 FIXED - u32→u64), supervision.rs (1 FIXED -
u32→u64), chaos.rs (2 FIXED - saturating_add), plus gen_server, timer
driver, session channels, first_ok — all SOUND.

Batch 415: kafka.rs, kafka_consumer.rs, messaging/stream.rs, snapshot.rs,
capability/{routing,tokens}.rs, trace/{recorder,buffer,scoring,
event_structure,tla_export}.rs — 15 files, all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
